name: NoLag Queue SDK Demo
description: Real-time job queue with progress tracking, worker management, and job lifecycle — powered by @nolag/queue

workerLoadBalancing.description: Workers automatically subscribe with round-robin load balancing. Each job event is delivered to only ONE worker in the group, preventing duplicate processing. Configure a custom loadBalanceGroup to partition workers by region or capability.

staticRooms.name: Image Processing Queue
staticRooms.description: Queue for image resize and transform jobs

staticLobbies.name: Online Presence
staticLobbies.description: Global presence tracking for queue workers
